name: spec-kitty-spdd-reasons
description: Drive REASONS Canvas authoring and review for Spec Kitty missions that opted in to Structured-Prompt-Driven Development (SPDD) via charter selection. Triggers: "use SPDD", "use REASONS", "generate a REASONS canvas", "apply structured prompt driven development", "make this mission SPDD". Does NOT handle: enforcing SPDD on projects whose charter has not selected the doctrine pack (escalate to charter workflow instead). Does NOT mirror code as prose; code remains the source of truth for current behavior.
